name: Hwei
description: Hwei, a masterful artist from the mystical Ionian island of Koyehn, wields his paintbrush not only to create art but to manifest magical powers. Torn between traditional artistry and his own explosive imagination, Hwei's journey is one of self-discovery, grappling with inner turmoil and a legacy of unexpected betrayal. In a world where magic and art intertwine, Hwei's story unfolds, revealing the depths of his creative spirit and the burdens of his extraordinary powers.
creator: BorutaDevil
